title: Non-Clinical Personality and EQ Assessment Framework

important_labeling.required_banner: Educational self-assessment only. Not a clinical, diagnostic, or licensed psychological instrument.

recommended_tracks.name: Big Five Style Traits
recommended_tracks.why: Broadly useful, flexible, and easy to present as a self-reflection tool.

recommended_tracks.why: More actionable for your app than generic personality labels.
